html:
{% set terms_exist = doc.terms and (doc.terms|striptags).strip() or "" %} {% if letter_head and not no_letterhead -%}
{{ letter_head }}
{%- endif %}

Date: {{ doc.offer_date }}

Dear {{ doc.applicant_name }},

We are pleased to appoint you in the services of {{ doc.company }} on the terms and conditions detailed in this letter.

Your designation shall be {{ doc.designation }}.

{%- if doc.offer_terms -%} {%- for row in doc.offer_terms -%} {{ row.offer_term }}: {{ row.value }}
{%- endfor -%} {%- endif -%}
Please read the detailed terms as below. If you have any queries, feel free to get in touch with us. We look forward to your long and fruitful career association with our organisation. If you decide to join us, 'Welcome to {{ doc.company }} !'

Yours truly,



Authorized Signatory
{{ doc.company }}

{% if terms_exist %}
{{ doc.terms }}
{% endif %}
name: Job Offer

ANNEXURE - 1

NAME {{ doc.employee_name }}
SALARY COMPONENTS MONTHLY ANNUALIZED

SUB TOTAL - (B) {{ doc.subtotal_b_monthly }} {{ doc.subtotal_b_annual }}
TOTAL A + B {{ doc.total_monthly }} {{ doc.total_annual }}

name: ANNEXURE-1

html:
{% set applicant = frappe.get_doc("Job Applicant", doc.job_applicant) %} {% set issuer = frappe.get_doc("User", doc.owner) %} {% if doc.custom_salary_annexure %} {% set annexure = frappe.get_doc("Salary Annexure", doc.custom_salary_annexure) %} {% else %} {% set annexure = None %} {% endif %} {{ letter_head }}
Date: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.offer_date) }}

TO,
{{ doc.applicant_name }}
{% if applicant.custom_address %} {{ applicant.custom_address | replace('\n', '
') }}
{% endif %} {% if applicant.phone_number %} Mobile No.: {{ applicant.phone_number }}
{% endif %}
Sub: Offer letter for appointment as {{ doc.designation }} under Grade {{ doc.custom_grade }} at {{ applicant.custom_location}} Site.

Dear {{ doc.applicant_name }},

This has reference to the discussions you had with us based on your application for employment in our Company. We are pleased to offer you an employment in our Company for {{ applicant.custom_location}} location, as a {{ doc.designation }} {% if doc.custom_grade %} under Grade {{ doc.custom_grade }} {% endif %}. Your remuneration and benefits will be as per the details provided in enclosed Annexure I.

Your appointment in our organization is subject to your competency assessment by our client where you will be appointed. You will be on probation for the period of six (06) months from the date of your joining our Company. Upon your joining our Company all the rules and regulations of the Company which are applicable to other employees of the Company will apply to you. On your joining our Company, a detailed Appointment Letter will be issued with detailed terms and conditions. Your appointment and continuation of employment in the company is subject to you being found medically fit, and satisfactory verification of antecedents, your past employment details, (as provided by you in the company employment form) and educational testimonials.

You should be joining on or before {{ doc.custom_joining_date }}. You are advised to contact {{ doc.custom_contact_name }} {% if doc.custom_mobile_no %} on Mobile No. {{ doc.custom_mobile_no }} {% endif %} for your further joining formalities and induction at the site.

You are requested to sign the duplicate copy of this Offer Letter along with Annexure I and return the same to us as a token of your acceptance of the Offer, indicating your date of joining. If the Company does not receive your acceptance on or before {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.custom_offer_acceptance_date) }}, it shall be presumed that you are not interested in this offer.

Please be informed that, your appointment and employment is liable for transfer to any other Sites or place of business of our Company/Group Company across India.

Looking forward to a long and mutually beneficial career with us.

Yours truly,
For Vaaman Engineers (India) Ltd.


{{ issuer.full_name }}
Head - HR








Registered Office: 510, Sai Leela Commercial Complex, S.V.Road, Borivali West, Mumbai - 400092, Maharashtra, India
{% if annexure %}
{{ letter_head }}

STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL

ANNEXURE - 1

{% for row in annexure.salary_components if row.section == "A" %} {% endfor %} {% for row in annexure.salary_components if row.section == "B" %} {% endfor %}
NAME {{ applicant.applicant_name }}
DESIGNATION {{ applicant.designation }}
SALARY COMPONENTS MONTHLY ANNUALIZED
{{ row.salary_component }} {{ row.monthly }} {{ row.annualized }}
SUB TOTAL – (A) {{ annexure.subtotal_a_monthly }} {{ annexure.subtotal_a_annual }}
{{ row.salary_component }} {{ row.monthly }} {{ row.annualized }}
SUB TOTAL – (B) {{ annexure.subtotal_b_monthly }} {{ annexure.subtotal_b_annual }}
TOTAL A + B {{ annexure.total_monthly }} {{ annexure.total_annual }}

{% endfor %} {% else %} {% for row in annexure.custom_terms_and_condtions %} {{ loop.index }}. {{ row.condition_text }}
{% endfor %} {% endif %}
For Vaaman Engineers (India) Ltd.


{{ issuer.full_name }}
Head - HR
“I Accept the Appointment on the terms mentioned above.”


Signature of Acceptance.





Registered Office: 510, Sai Leela Commercial Complex, S.V.Road, Borivali West, Mumbai - 400092, Maharashtra, India

name: Offer Letter with Annexure

html:
{% set applicant = frappe.get_doc("Job Applicant", doc.job_applicant) %} {% set issuer = frappe.get_doc("User", doc.owner) %}
{{ doc.company }}

Registered Office:
510, Sai Leela Commercial Complex,
S.V. Road, Borivali West,
Mumbai – 400092, Maharashtra, India

Date: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.offer_date) }}

TO,
{{ doc.applicant_name }}
{% if applicant.custom_address %} {{ applicant.custom_address | replace('\n', '
') }}
{% endif %} {% if applicant.phone_number %} Mobile No.: {{ applicant.phone_number }}
{% endif %}
Sub: Offer letter for appointment as {{ doc.designation }}

Dear {{ doc.applicant_name }},

This has reference to the discussions you had with us based on your application for employment in our Company. We are pleased to offer you an employment in our Company for {{ applicant.custom_location}} location, as a {{ doc.designation }} {% if doc.grade %} under Grade {{ doc.grade }} {% endif %}. Your remuneration and benefits will be as per the details provided in enclosed Annexure I.

Your appointment in our organization is subject to your competency assessment by our client where you will be appointed. You will be on probation for a period of six (06) months from the date of your joining our Company.

Upon joining, all the rules and regulations of the Company applicable to other employees shall apply to you.

A detailed Appointment Letter containing the full terms and conditions of employment shall be issued at the time of joining.

Your appointment and continuation of employment is subject to you being found medically fit and to satisfactory verification of your antecedents, past employment details, and educational testimonials.

You should be joining on or before You are advised to contact {{ issuer.full_name }} {% if doc.cell_number %} on Mobile No. {{ doc.cell_number }} {% endif %} for your further joining formalities and induction at the site.

You are requested to sign the duplicate copy of this Offer Letter along with Annexure I and return the same to us as a token of your acceptance of the Offer, indicating your date of joining. If the Company does not receive your acceptance on or before {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.custom_offer_acceptance_date) }}, it shall be presumed that you are not interested in this offer.

Please note that your appointment and employment are liable for transfer to any other site or place of business of the Company / Group Company across India.

Looking forward to a long and mutually beneficial career with us.

Yours truly,

{{ issuer.full_name }}
Authorized Signatory
{{ doc.company }}
name: OFFER LETTER

html:
{% set applicant = frappe.get_doc("Job Applicant", doc.job_applicant) %} {% if doc.custom_employee %} {% set emp = frappe.get_doc("Employee", doc.custom_employee) %} {% endif %} {% if emp and emp.reports_to %} {% set reporting_emp = frappe.get_doc("Employee", emp.reports_to) %} {% endif %} {% set offer_name = frappe.db.get_value( "Job Offer", {"job_applicant": doc.job_applicant}, "name" ) %} {% if offer_name %} {% set offer = frappe.get_doc("Job Offer", offer_name) %} {% endif %} {% set salary_amount = (doc.custom_monthly_gross_salary | float) if doc.custom_monthly_gross_salary else 0 %} {% set salary_words = frappe.utils.money_in_words(salary_amount, "INR") %} {{ letter_head }}

VEIL/HR/Mumbai/{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.appointment_date, "MMyyyy") }}
Date: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.appointment_date, "dd/MM/yyyy") }}

To,
{{ applicant.applicant_name }}
EMPLOYEE CODE - {{ emp.name if doc.custom_employee else "" }}
{{ applicant.custom_location }} Site.

Subject: Letter of Appointment


Dear {{ applicant.applicant_name }},

We are pleased to welcome you into the {{ doc.company }} family and look forward to a mutually beneficial association with us.

The terms & conditions of your Appointment are as follows:


1. Your employment details are:
a) Designation: {{ applicant.designation }}.
b) Date of Joining: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(offer.custom_joining_date) if offer_name else "" }}
c) Reporting: {{ reporting_emp.employee_name if emp and emp.reports_to else "" }}.
d) Location: {{ applicant.custom_location }} site.


2. During your employment with us you shall be paid consolidated Monthly Gross Salary Rs. {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(salary_amount, currency="INR") }}/- (Rupees {{ salary_words }} Only) subject to statutory deductions as per law.


3. Leave eligibility & administration will be as per Company leave policy applicable to your work site.


4.Your employment in the company is subject to you being found medically fit and satisfactory verification of antecedents, your past employment details, (as provided by you in the company employment form) and educational testimonials. However, in case any discrepancy is found in any of above, the management may initiate appropriate action for such false declaration, including termination of services.


5. You shall be governed by the service Rules & Regulations and policies of the Company that are in force or will be introduced and /or modified from time to time. Any amendment or modification thereto shall be binding on you


6. You shall diligently carry out such duties as assigned to you and during such hours as may be stipulated by the Company and perform your duties as may be assigned to you from time to time, in shifts, if required.


7. Your employment with the Company shall be transferable and the Company reserves the right to depute / transfer your services to any other location or Group Company or where any of its associates have their establishments or may set up new establishments. Upon such transfer, applicable transfer expenses will be reimbursed to you against presentation of supporting documents.


8. The refusal of such transfer on your part amounts to resignation and you shall be deemed to have resigned from the service of the Company without Notice from the date of refusal of such transfer.


9. You will be on Probation for a period of 6 (Six) months from the date of Joining. The said probation period can be terminated earlier or extended further at the sole discretion of the management. Unless communicated in writing, you will continue to be on probation period. During or at the end of probation period or extended probation period, if management is not satisfied with your service, your service shall be terminated without assigning any reason, without giving any notice/notice pay.

Registered Office: 510, Sai Leela Commercial Complex, S.V.Road, Borivali West, Mumbai - 400092, Maharashtra, India

10. After confirmation, the Notice period or notice pay on resignation or termination shall be subject to One month on either side or one month’s gross salary in lieu of notice. However, the management reserves the right to accept your resignation with effect from such date as it may deem fit, considering the criticality of the assignment and the prevailing business exigencies.


11. Notwithstanding anything contained hereinabove, the Company is at liberty to terminate your service forthwith without assigning any reason thereof or any notice or any compensation, in case you are found guilty, of any act of disobedience, insubordin ation, incivility, insobriety, dishonesty, or of any act or omission, conduct or commission or irregularity, whether during the course of employment or otherwise which in the opinion of the company is detrimental to its interests.


12. While in the services of the Company, you shall not engage directly or indirectly in any trade or business or undertake any other employment with or without any commercial gain. Breach of this condition shall lead to immediate termination of your services by the Company without any notice or compensation.


13. At the time of termination of employment, you shall return all materials of the Company and shall not use it further for other company or for your personal purpose.


14. You will deliver all such data and information to the Company upon the Company’s request and, in any event, upon termination of employment, and will be fully responsible for the care and protection thereof until such delivery.


15. All information, data and knowledge regardless of form, generated in the performance of or delivered during employment, as well as any information provided to you by the Company, shall be and remain the sole property of the Company. You shall not divulge the same in any manner whatsoever or use it for your benefit or for the benefit of any other person. You shall not use company resources for other commercial activities or for personal gain.


16. You shall strive to plan and complete work in shortest possible time and as scheduled. You will guide your team to excel on all work allotted. You will give your whole time and attention to the said engagement and shall use your best endeavor to improve and expand the same and shall in all respects diligently and faithfully obey and observe all lawful orders and instructions of your Superiors in relation to the conduct of the said business and shall not, at any time (whether during continuance of your employment or thereafter) divulge any secrets or dealings thereto.


17. You are requested to carry out all the duties, which may be reasonably required from you from time to time by the Management.


18. You will be governed by all the rules and regulation applicable as per the Grade Level Structure of the Company during your employment.


19. You agree that during the term of employment and for a period of twelve months after the termination of your employment, you shall not in any way, directly or indirectly:
a) Induce or attempt to induce any employee of the Company to quit employment with the company.
b) Otherwise interfere with or disrupt Company’s relationship with its employees.
c) Solicit, entice, or hire away any employee of the Company.
d) For a period of one year from the date of you ceasing to be an employee of the Company, neither you nor any of your associates will solicit the employment of any of the employee(s) engaged in the business of the company and/or its associate/group companies.


20. The Company prides itself as a Company with highest order of ethical conduct in dealin g with customers, dealers, vendors, suppliers, subcontractors, staff or the like by whatever name called. As part of your association with the Company it is important that you fully understand this philosophy and the policies governing it. You shall maintain utmost discipline and good conduct in your dealing with your colleagues, customers etc. The Company values every employee as an individual and an asset of the Company and will not tolerate any objectionable behavior including however not limiting to verbal abuse, sexual harassment, gender discrimination, misuse of Company property, theft, cheating or any such act of any individual or body of individuals.


21. You shall, at all times while at the Company’s premises/ Associate’s premises:
a) Act diligently, ethically, soberly and honestly;
b) Not consume or be under the influence of alcohol or use any drug, unless prescribed by a medical practitioner or lawfully available without prescription and used in accordance with directions.
c) Comply with all occupational health or safety policies of the Company.
d) Comply with all procedures, rules, regulations, standards of conduct and lawful directions of the Company in respect of use of its premises, equipment, business ethics or methodology or contact with the staff or customers.
e) Not commit any criminal offence and not otherwise breach any law or regulation which could adversely affect the interests of the Company or the provisions of the Services.
f) Not sexually harass any person.
g) Not engage in discriminatory behavior
h) Carry and display at all times appropriate company identification and
i) Not otherwise act in any manner, which could disrupt or adversely affect the Company’s business reputation, interests or goodwill.
j) Not do any act that is prejudicial to Company’s interest or commit breach of ethical policy/ policies of the Company as detailed in Ethics Policy.


22. Company will provide as per applicability all PPEs including 2 sets of uniform per year, one set of safety shoes, safety helmet. If you are found not wearing, while on duty, disciplinary action will be taken in the form of levy of fine. You will ensure that the uniform is always neat and tidy. In case anybody resigns, deduction for PPE will be as follows (If applicable). Within 3 months of issue full amount, within 6 months of issue 50% amount and after 6 months of issue NIL amount to be recovered from Full & Final Settlement


23. You shall communicate to the company any change in your address as well as personal status. All communication sent to you in the normal course to the address given by you shall be deemed to have been received by you.


24. In the unlikely event of any information furnished by you in connection with your employment with us, is suppressed or found to be false or incorrect, your services are liable to be terminated forthwith, without any Notice Pay or compensation whatsoever.


25. The age of retirement on superannuation is 58 years.


26. The Courts of law at Mumbai shall have exclusive jurisdiction over any disputes arising under this agreement. All claims, actions, proceedings and disputes arising out of this Agreement shall be commenced accordingly.


27. In acceptance of the aforesaid terms of appointment, please sign and return the duplicate copy of this letter.


28.The Company reserves the right to alter the above Terms & Conditions at its discretion.



We look forward to your joining the Vaaman family soon and wish you a rewarding and successful career with the Group.



For Vaaman Engineers (India) Ltd.


Associate General Manager-HR


“I Accept the Appointment on the terms mentioned above.”



Signature of Acceptance.
name: Appointment Letter Worker To Staff
